title: Jove To Hercules.
content:
'Twas not my nectar made thy strength divine,
    But 'twas thy strength which made my nectar thine!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Friedrich Schiller delivers a powerful performance in "Jove To Hercules."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
